race.comment: CREEK (5) has been thereabouts without threatening in four runs this prep, all in town. Talented sprinter when right and will relish this huge drop in class. Has only won once but this looks the ideal race for him to double the tally. CITY PRO (6) has also been racing in Adelaide and finding the going tough. Best figures stack up nicely and the inside draw ensures a soft run in transit. Can turn things around. DIRNASEER (2) came from worse than midfield on the bend to get up for fourth when resuming over 1300m at Warrnambool last start. Scored second-up last prep so he should kick on with that run under the belt. SHAL EXCEED (10) has been struggling in better races of late. Worth noting he has raced here at this trip five times for two wins and two placings. Watch for a much better run. NIETZSCHE (15) went okay first-up at Ararat and will enjoy getting over a bit more ground this afternoon.
